title: poa legionensis
intro: Poa legionensis, also known as Legion's meadow-grass, is a species of grass in the genus Poa, native to Spain. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Poa legionensis include its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. Poa legionensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be easily accessed and utilized for various health purposes.
